'''Thebeon 8''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Thebeon system/Legends|Thebeon system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] with a pro-[[New Order/Legends|New Order]] government. Its ruler was styled "[[Most High Proctor]]."

==History==
Thebeon 8 was explored sometime between [[15,000 BBY/Legends|15,000 BBY]] and [[8000 BBY]].<ref name="Atlas" />

==Inhabitants==
Thebeon 8 boasted a population of 1 million to 10 million [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]].<ref name="Atlas" />

==Appearances==
*"[[Princess Leia, Imperial Servant]]" {{Reprint|Princess Leia, Imperial Servant}} {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
